name: crucible
description: Marketplace do Crucible — o ciclo completo de engenharia disciplinada para o dev solo, em PT-BR.

plugins.name: crucible
plugins.description: Quinze skills de Claude Code (PT-BR) que levam o dev solo da ideia ao deploy: onboarding guiado (start, stack, design, setup, roadmap, next, status, ops) + ciclo de engenharia (context, brainstorm, plan, coding, fix, ship) + help.
